summary: Yt Connection Recap Outro component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「Connection 系列总结片尾」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-connection-recap-outro/src/YtConnectionRecapOutro.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtConnectionRecapOutro` and `ytConnectionRecapOutroDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Connection Recap Outro Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-connection-recap-outro to my project. Preserve the exported YtConnectionRecapOutroProps API and register the YtConnectionRecapOutro composition with the default props.
